design_system.rationale: The Document PiP child document copies --bg-ivory and --text-black from the opener and applies them via CSS variables.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on Google Chrome/Chromium 148 loaded http://localhost:3000/v130/document-picture-in-picture-add-option-to-ignore-window-bounds-cache/context-switch/, confirmed documentPictureInPicture support, clicked Open VC PiP, Open chat (cached bounds), Open chat (ignore bounds), and Close any open PiP. Each opened PiP body resolved to rgb(253, 252, 248) background and rgb(0, 0, 0) text from copied --bg-ivory/--text-black tokens; the final post-close probe reported currently open: no. Console had no messages, and all network requests completed with page/styles/fonts 200 and favicon 204.
